profile_summary: Leisure traveler (mid-high budget) prioritizing beach access, food & dining.

recommendations.justification: Casa Solana, Rome ranks #1 for this traveler on beach access (+0.89), food & dining (+0.80), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Fantastic for families — connecting rooms, a kids' club, and high chairs at breakfast."

supporting_evidence.quote: Fantastic for families — connecting rooms, a kids' club, and high chairs at breakfast.
Woke up to the sea every morning — the beachfront setting was perfect.
Just steps from a beautiful stretch of beach with loungers ready.

recommendations.justification: The Regent Riverside, Seoul ranks #2 for this traveler on beach access (+0.83), food & dining (+0.85), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Woke up to the sea every morning — the beachfront setting was perfect."

supporting_evidence.quote: Woke up to the sea every morning — the beachfront setting was perfect.
The breakfast spread was extensive and genuinely delicious.
Direct beach access made the whole stay feel like a proper getaway.

recommendations.justification: The Continental, Sydney ranks #3 for this traveler on beach access (+0.83), food & dining (+0.82), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Outstanding dining; we never felt the need to eat elsewhere."

supporting_evidence.quote: Outstanding dining; we never felt the need to eat elsewhere.
Direct beach access made the whole stay feel like a proper getaway.
Just steps from a beautiful stretch of beach with loungers ready.
